plugins.name: local
plugins.description: Seven skills: pre-PR local review, GitHub PR review, PR-fix automation, draft PR creation, doc-to-Linear plan extraction, TIB scaffolding, and rubric setup. Shares a persona library + SessionStart hook that auto-installs 18 Vercel/community rubric skills.
